     for batch_idx, (data, targets) in enumerate(dataloader):

@@ -114,12 +111,17 @@
                 domain_features_batch[domain_id] = features[mask]

         

         # Compute CORAL loss between all pairs of domains

-        domains_with_data = [i for i in range(3) if len(domain_features_batch[i]) > 0]

             for i in range(len(domains_with_data)):

                 for j in range(i+1, len(domains_with_data)):

                     d1, d2 = domains_with_data[i], domains_with_data[j]

+                    src_feat = domain_features_batch[d1]

+                    tgt_feat = domain_features_batch[d2]

+                    

+                    # Only compute CORAL if both domains have enough samples

+                    if src_feat.size(0) > 1 and tgt_feat.size(0) > 1:

+                        coral_loss += model.coral(src_feat, tgt_feat)

         

         # Combined loss

         total_loss = class_loss + 0.3 * domain_loss + 0.1 * coral_loss  # Added CORAL loss

+

 # Validation function

 def validate(model, dataloader, class_criterion, device):

     model.eval()

-    running_loss = 0.0

+    val_loss = 0

     correct = 0

     total = 0

     all_targets = []

         for data, targets in dataloader:

             data, targets = data.to(device), targets.to(device)

+            outputs = model(data)

             loss = class_criterion(outputs, targets)

             

-            running_loss += loss.item()

             _, predicted = outputs.max(1)

             total += targets.size(0)

             correct += predicted.eq(targets).sum().item()

     balanced_acc = balanced_accuracy_score(all_targets, all_predictions)

 # Training loop
